---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for AgroOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "priority:medium"
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? Who is it for (landlord, tenant, cooperative, admin, etc.)?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about and why you didn't go with them.

## Is this MVP-critical?
- [ ] Yes — needed for Moolre Startup Cup submission
- [ ] No — post-MVP / nice-to-have

If yes, add the `mvp` label above.

## Additional context
Mockups, related issues, links, anything else useful.
